question: A company tracks its average website sign-ups per year. According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year proves that sign-ups are now permanently declining.
options.B: The latest year clearly shows a sharp drop in sign-ups compared with previous full years.
options.C: The latest year has the lowest total sign-ups of the entire period on record.
options.D: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified, because the latest year only includes data up to Apr 01, 2024.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (586 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,770 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
